## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI/Tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm test:int`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Release impact

- [ ] No release needed
- [ ] Patch
- [ ] Minor
- [ ] Major

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs where needed.
- [ ] I considered backward compatibility.
- [ ] I verified publish scripts still pass (`pnpm publish:check`).
